title: Update Squid
description: Update squid settings including parameters, concurrency, scheduling, and delivery integrations

content.introduction:
This endpoint updates an existing squid's settings using its hash ID. You can configure crawler parameters, execution settings, scheduling, notifications, and data delivery integrations.

{{RENDER:squidSettings}}

parameters.name: concurrency
parameters.description: Number of concurrent tasks to run simultaneously (1-20).

parameters.name: to_complete
parameters.description: Stop after all tasks complete (true) or run until credits exhausted (false).

parameters.name: export_unique_results
parameters.description: Export only unique results, removing duplicates.

parameters.name: cron_expression
parameters.description: Cron expression for scheduling automated runs.

parameters.name: squid_hash
parameters.description: The unique identifier (hash) of the squid to update

body.name: concurrency
body.description: Number of concurrent tasks to execute (1-20)

body.name: is_active
body.description: Set to true to activate the squid, false to deactivate

body.name: params
body.description: Crawler-specific parameters and settings. Structure varies by crawler - check crawler details for available parameters.

body.name: to_complete
body.description: Stop the run after completing all tasks (true) or continue until credits exhausted (false)

body.name: export_unique_results
body.description: Export only unique results to the export file

body.name: no_line_breaks
body.description: Remove line breaks from exported file

body.name: cron_expression
body.description: Cron expression for scheduling automated runs

proTips.content: The params object structure depends on the crawler. Use Get Crawler Parameters endpoint to see available options before updating.
Optional function parameters (in params.functions) cost extra credits per row. Check the crawler details for pricing.
Setting is_active to false will prevent the squid from running. Use this to temporarily pause a squid without deleting it.
You can update just one field at a time - send only the fields you want to change. Other settings remain unchanged.
Use cron_expression and timezone to schedule recurring runs. Common patterns: '0 9 * * *' (daily at 9am), '0 0 * * 0' (weekly on Sunday).

seo.title: Update Squid - lobstr.io API Documentation
seo.description: Learn how to update squid settings, parameters, scheduling, and integrations using the lobstr.io API. Includes configuration examples.
